system.description: Low-light or thermographic vision, high/low-frequency hearing, enhanced smell or taste — anything cyberware could improve (no radios). .25 per improvement. SR2E p.125.
system.notes: SR2E p.125. 0.25 pts per improvement. Options: low-light vision, thermographic vision, high/low-freq hearing, enhanced smell/taste, etc. (anything cybernetic except radio). No package deals.
